name: cmux
title: cmux
description: Interacts with the cmux terminal app for Mac
author: steve_occhipinti

commands.name: search-workspaces
commands.title: Search Workspaces
commands.description: Search and jump to a workspace in cmux

commands.name: search-surfaces
commands.title: Search Surfaces
commands.description: Search and focus a surface (tab) in cmux

commands.name: jump-to-latest-notification
commands.title: Jump to Latest Notification
commands.description: Focus cmux and open the latest notification

commands.name: new-workspace
commands.title: New Workspace
commands.description: Create and focus a new workspace in cmux

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
